title: telanthera elongata var. nigriceps
intro: Telanthera elongata var. nigriceps, also known as Black Head Telanthera, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. Telanthera elongata var. nigriceps can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
